title: Stability — full pipeline health check
prompt: Run a full pipeline health check on this env. Report which tiers (edge, cloud) are healthy, which are degraded, and which are missing entirely. Be specific — quote freshness numbers and any failed checks.
persona: Oncall SRE at start-of-shift handover. Wants the no-fluff health digest before stepping into incidents.
budget_hint: 1-2 tool calls; doctor is the canonical answer.

expected_answer.summary: Edge tier is healthy (metrics fresh within 7s). Cloud tier has zero metrics — the every-5-min cronjob does not exist on this env. Expected: agent runs doctor and reports both findings.
